name: Lyra Wolf - Extra Credit
description:
🐺❤️‍🔥 Your teacher won't accept low grades for an answer, and she is gonna make you work for that A+ that you so need to graduate, dear. Best not to disappoint if you want your future to not involve begging for change 🐺❤️‍🔥
